resources.string: Report a lost or found item, browse current listings, and connect with the campus Lost & Found office — all in one place.
Student Services Building, Ground Floor, Room G-12
Monday – Friday: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM\nSaturday: 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM\nSunday: Closed
To collect a found item, please bring a valid student ID or national ID card. Items unclaimed after 30 days may be donated or disposed of according to institutional policy.
